carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
conclusion: Atlas Travel: pays 100% of eligible expenses after deductible up to overall max. No in-network/out-of-network differential (unlike Atlas Essential which has 70% PPO/outside PPO). Source: brochure (L5).
section: Atlas Series Schedule of Benefits — Coinsurance
exact_language: We will pay 100% of eligible expenses after the deductible up to the overall maximum limit. [Atlas Travel column]
flag: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — Source is brochure/comparison, not full Certificate.

carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
conclusion: ER illness (US): $200 co-payment for ER facility fee if illness does not result in hospitalization. No co-payment for injury. No co-payment outside US. Source: brochure (L5).
section: Atlas Series Schedule of Benefits — Emergency Room Co-payment
exact_language: You shall be responsible for a $200 co-payment for the emergency room facility fee for each use of the emergency room for an illness unless you are admitted to the hospital. There will be no co-payment for emergency room treatment of an injury.
flag: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — Source is brochure/comparison, not full Certificate.

carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
conclusion: Acute Onset covered up to overall max + $25,000 emergency medical evacuation. Must be under 80. Not available for Atlas Essential. Source: brochure (L5).
